heading: Availability of appropriations for transportation, reprint, telephone, and library membership expenses
label: 1471d Availability of appropriations for transportation, reprint, telephone, and library membership expenses
text: Appropriations in this title or appropriations made under this title in subsequent Energy and Water Development Appropriations Acts shall on and after , be available for hire, maintenance, and operation of aircraft; hire of passenger motor vehicles; purchases of reprints; payment for telephone services in private residences in the field, when authorized under regulations approved by the Secretary; and the payment of dues, when authorized by the Secretary, for library memberships in societies or associations which issue publications to members only or at a price to members lower than to subscribers who are not members.11See References in Text note below.1October 2, 1992
notes: References in TextThis title, referred to in text, is title II of , , . For complete classification of title II to Code, see Tables.Pub. L. 102–377106 Stat. 1327Oct. 2, 1992
